Fractional CMO for B2B SaaS

AI-native go-to-market strategy built for SaaS growth. Demand generation, positioning, and product-market fit acceleration—without the C-suite overhead.

Schedule SaaS Strategy Call See All Services

For Series A–C SaaS companies scaling to $10M+ ARR. Fractional engagements from $12K–$60K/month.

Why B2B SaaS Demands Specialized Marketing

Long Sales Cycles

Enterprise deals take 3–12 months. Strategy must bridge long gaps with nurture, positioning, and proof points.

Unit Economics Pressure

Every marketing dollar must prove ROI. CAC payback, LTV, and magic number are non-negotiable KPIs.

Competitive Positioning

Crowded SaaS markets require sharp differentiation. We craft positioning that resonates with buyers and wins against competitors.

PLG + Sales Hybrid

B2B SaaS often blends product-led growth with direct sales. Marketing must support both bottom-up and top-down motions.

AI-Powered GTM

Modern SaaS GTM uses AI for predictive lead scoring, campaign optimization, and market intelligence. We leverage this natively.

Rapid Iteration

SaaS moves fast. Messaging, positioning, and go-to-market need to evolve with product and market feedback in weeks, not quarters.

Our B2B SaaS Playbook

Demand Generation & Pipeline

Design and execute multi-channel demand campaigns that generate qualified pipeline. Optimize ad spend, prioritize high-LTV segments, and build nurture flows that move prospects toward close.

Positioning & Messaging

Clarify your value prop and differentiation. Craft messaging and positioning that resonates with your ICP and beats competitor narratives.

Product-Market Fit Validation

If you're pre-PMF, we help validate assumptions, run discovery, and iterate messaging based on market feedback to accelerate fit.

Revenue Metrics & Analytics

Build dashboards for CAC, LTV, payback period, magic number, and pipeline velocity. Make data-driven decisions and forecast growth.

Content & Thought Leadership

Build authority and awareness through targeted content, case studies, and customer stories that support your ICP's buying journey.

Sales Enablement & Alignment

Ensure marketing and sales are aligned on messaging, ICP, and lead qualification. Create playbooks and resources that help sales close faster.

The Ideal B2B SaaS Partner

You're likely a fit if:

  • Series A–C SaaS with $1M–$30M ARR
  • You have a viable product and initial traction
  • Sales cycle is 3+ months
  • You're struggling with positioning or lead quality
  • Your marketing team needs executive leadership and strategy
  • You care deeply about CAC, LTV, and unit economics

You might not be yet if:

  • You're pre-product or heavily pre-PMF
  • Your product needs significant work before scaling marketing
  • You have no sales team or go-to-market process
  • Your ICP is unclear or still being validated
  • You're not ready to commit to a 6+ month engagement

Ready to Scale Your SaaS?

Let's discuss your GTM challenges and explore how a fractional CMO can accelerate your growth.
